data.title: Queen Sofía leads symposium on Spain's role in American Revolution, DAR launches America 250. Two-day event with international experts. Washington, Oct. 9, 2025.
data.description: The Daughters of the American Revolution (DAR) and the Queen Sofía Spanish Institute (QSSI), in partnership with Fundación Ramón Areces (FRA), recently organized a two-day event in Washington. The event took place on October 9, 2025, and brought together international experts to share valuable research findings and insights. This collaborative effort aimed to engage the public in meaningful discussions and knowledge exchange.

data.title: Accenture and Google Cloud collaborate to advance agentic AI solutions in client reinvention.
data.description: Accenture and Google Cloud have formed a partnership to develop Gemini Enterprise agentic AI solutions tailored for clients. This collaboration aims to facilitate client reinvention through cutting-edge AI technology.

data.title: New Japan PM aims to enhance crypto economy, revamp blockchain regulations. Takaichi's election may significantly influence crypto governance.
data.description: According to regulatory experts who spoke to Cointelegraph, the election of Takaichi could significantly affect the governance and regulatory outlook of crypto assets in Japan.

data.title: Study by Cadenza Bio reveals ERβ ligands drive remyelination in MS models, published in Scientific Reports.
data.description: In an article released by Scientific Reports, a Nature Portfolio publication, the research outlines the effects of dual acting small molecules that aid in myelin restoration, inflammation regulation, and enhancement of visual pathway function in preclinical models of Multiple Sclerosis. The study was conducted in Oklahoma City and the findings were revealed on October 9, 2025. Cadenza Bio, Inc. made the announcement, showcasing promising results in the field.

data.title: Orsted to slash 25% of workforce due to wind power setbacks, including delays and higher costs in US. Focusing on Europe.
data.description: Facing setbacks such as delays and increased costs, as well as opposition from the Trump administration hindering its projects in the U.S., the Danish company is now shifting its focus back to Europe.

data.title: Metavesco announces OTCfi Pulse, a unique prediction market for OTC traded stocks, launching soon.
data.description: In the town of Cumming, Georgia, on October 9, 2025, Metavesco, Inc. revealed plans to introduce OTCfi Pulse, a unique community prediction market for OTC traded stocks. Metavesco, Inc. (MVCO), operating as a diversified holding company involved in digital assets and traditional sectors, made this announcement. OTCfi Pulse is set to be a pioneering platform tailored for OTC stocks, aiming to engage the community in predicting market movements.

data.title: VoicePix 2.0 launched by Core AI, boosting their position in AI audio technology. #AI #VoicePix 2.0
data.description: The number of confirmed COVID-19 cases has surpassed 10 million worldwide, with the death toll reaching over 500,000. In the United States alone, there have been over 2.5 million cases and more than 125,000 deaths. The rapid spread of the virus has led to lockdowns and restrictions in various countries in an effort to contain the virus. Scientists and health officials continue to work on developing a vaccine to combat the pandemic.

data.title: Ferrari raises 2025 revenue outlook to ≥7.1 billion euros, targeting 9.0 billion euros by 2030 with 40% EBITDA margin.
data.description: Ferrari N.V. (RACE) released its 2030 strategic plan and updated financial guidance. For 2025, revenue is projected to be ≥7.1 billion euros, adjusted EBITDA ≥2.72 billion euros, and adjusted EPS ≥8.80 euros. By 2030, they are targeting net revenues of approximately 9.0 billion euros and an EBITDA of at least 3.6 billion euros, aiming for an EBITDA margin of at least 40%. The plan includes a compound annual growth rate of about 5% and focuses on the sports car segment. Shares traded lower following the news. (Words: 92)

data.title: Danish wind developer Orsted to slash 25% of staff amid setbacks in US, focusing on base in Europe.
data.description: Facing setbacks from delays and increased costs, a Danish company is scaling back its operations in the United States after encountering resistance from the Trump administration. The company is redirecting its focus to its base in Europe amid these challenges.

data.title: Polimetal, a subsidiary of ACG Metals Limited, secures 2% NSR royalty over mining license in Niğde Province, Türkiye.
data.description: ACG Metals Limited, based in London, revealed on October 9, 2025, that its subsidiary, Polimetal, has successfully obtained a 2% Net Smelter Return ("NSR") royalty for a mining license area situated in Niğde Province, Çamardı District, Türkiye. This NSR interest marks a significant development for the Company as it continues to expand its presence in the mining sector.
